---
title: "Cameos from English History: IX. The Eighteenth Century. By the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe.”"
---

## Cameos from English History: IX. The Eighteenth Century. By the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe.”

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1899
**Genre:** Non-fiction: history
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** London and New York: Macmillan and Company.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
